# AEDataStorageType

**Type Alias**

An opaque data type used to store data in Apple event descriptors.

## Declaration

```swift
typealias AEDataStorageType = OpaquePointer
```

## Discussion

See [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/coreservices/aedesc] for related information.
